title: Add transform() to KMeans / MiniBatchKMeans / BisectingKMeans
description:
sklearn KMeans-family transform(X) returns the (n_samples, n_clusters) distance matrix from each sample to each centroid (used for feature engineering and pipeline composition).

ferrolearn has predict on these (returns labels) but no transform. Add Transform impl returning Array2<F> of Euclidean distances for FittedKMeans, FittedMiniBatchKMeans, FittedBisectingKMeans. The centroid arrays are already stored.
